missionFrame.function: Open the campaign, establish acting command, and make route custody the first consequential command problem.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: What does the new Executive Officer treat as authoritative when the chart and the inhabited universe disagree?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Unseen Border from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
reveal complete hidden truth without evidence

phases.title: Delegated Command
phases.summary: The player assumes acting command as the Aster Vale departs Meridian without Captain Kellan, while the crew tests new reporting and delegation routines.
pressures: Chen has already run the ship for six weeks
Halden's former procedures remain embedded in routine
phases.directorPurpose: The player assumes acting command as the Aster Vale departs Meridian without Captain Kellan, while the crew tests new reporting and delegation routines.

phases.title: The Blank Route
phases.summary: The official route to Halloway terminates in empty space while civilian transponder traces continue across the blank area.
objectives: Prevent following traffic from entering uncertainty
Compare chart layers and local traffic
pressures: Civilian pilots treat the route as ordinary
Any warning may expose the corridor
phases.directorPurpose: The official route to Halloway terminates in empty space while civilian transponder traces continue across the blank area.
playerFacingObjectives: Prevent following traffic from entering uncertainty
Compare chart layers and local traffic

phases.title: Crossing or Closure
phases.summary: The player commits a route doctrine through direct crossing, local pilotage, probe work, temporary closure, or withdrawal.
objectives: Preserve a record of what was observed
pressures: Sensor confidence changes during the crossing
A school transport approaches from Halloway
The ship cannot verify every branch simultaneously
phases.directorPurpose: The player commits a route doctrine through direct crossing, local pilotage, probe work, temporary closure, or withdrawal.
playerFacingObjectives: Preserve a record of what was observed

phases.title: A Valid Signature
phases.summary: The route discrepancy yields a recent checksum tied to Halden's emergency credentials and evidence of a maintained civilian marker chain.
objectives: Separate what is known from inference
Secure evidence without exposing the route
pressures: The checksum may be a clue, authorization, or bait
phases.directorPurpose: The route discrepancy yields a recent checksum tied to Halden's emergency credentials and evidence of a maintained civilian marker chain.
playerFacingObjectives: Separate what is known from inference
Secure evidence without exposing the route

phases.title: The First Command Record
phases.summary: The player commits a report, route status, and standing order that define the opening doctrine of the campaign.
objectives: Record known facts and protected details
pressures: Every report creates access for someone
The crew is judging how command describes uncertainty
Kellan will eventually read the record
phases.directorPurpose: The player commits a report, route status, and standing order that define the opening doctrine of the campaign.
playerFacingObjectives: Record known facts and protected details

clocks.label: Prelude: The Blank Route Pressure
advanceTriggers: Delay, unresolved hazards, or escalating faction action.

readinessGates.motive: The pressure follows directly from the authored mission situation.

readinessGates.timing: Advance at scene or mission boundaries.

decisionPoints.title: Opening Route Doctrine
decisionPoints.stakes: Civilian safety; route exposure; Starfleet authority; first crew confidence
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; any listed approaches are examples only.

decisionPoints.title: The First Report
decisionPoints.stakes: Evidence custody; local trust; institutional scrutiny; Halden trail
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; any listed approaches are examples only.

commandDecisions.title: Opening Route Doctrine
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about opening route doctrine.

commandDecisions.title: The First Report
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about the first report.
